title: V8 Sandbox Bypass: StringToBigIntHelper stack-buffer-overflow
bounty_rationale: V8 sandbox bypass demonstrating memory corruption outside the sandbox
description_snippet:
#### VULNERABILITY DETAILS
Converting a very long string to a `BigInt` overflows the stack buffer used during conversion. I guess some of the checks in `FromStringAccumulator::Parse` do not deal correctly with very long input arguments.

**Please note that ASAN would terminate on the read on line `b
